keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $700.76 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $745.45 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $700.76 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AAPL CALL — enter $11.13–$12.31, target $17.58+, stop $7.03.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.78% and SPY +0.29%. Composite sentiment +26 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by vix, qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 13.52 (-2.96%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Technology (+0.92%) is leading while Industrials (-1.95%) lags. Premarket strength in GOOGL, AMD; weakness in AAPL, BA. The desk's highest-conviction setup is AAPL (7.3/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
